data.title: D&H expands logistics unit with acquisition of Fulfillment.com
data.description: D&H said the move reflects growing demand from brands for outsourced fulfillment and cross-border logistics as ecommerce volumes and service expectations increase.

data.title: OpenAI signals expansion of ChatGPT into commerce as AI usage and revenue surge
data.description: OpenAI said both weekly and daily active users are at all-time highs. Its CFO describes the driving factor as a flywheel linking computing capacity, model performance, product adoption and revenue.

data.title: Pinterest prepping new TV show on Roku with shoppable features
data.description: Scheduled to air in March, "Bring My Pinterest to Life" is designed to integrate shoppable options within the Roku viewing experience instead of interrupting programming with traditional ads.

data.title: Walmart's head of ecommerce named new CEO for Walmart U.S.
data.description: The leadership changes at Walmart and Sam's Club will accompany John Furner's arrival as Walmart's new president and CEO.

data.title: Morrison launches Fillex to support growth of ecommerce pharmacy fulfillment
data.description: The company will be led by CEO Dain Rusk, a longtime pharmacy executive who most recently served as vice president of pharmacy at Publix Super Markets.
